business.name: Santa's Secret
business.description: Santa's Secret is a magical Christmas decoration and gift shop in Bungendore, NSW, Australia. They specialise in bespoke, handcrafted decorations and gifts — one-of-a-kind pieces that blend tradition with modern flair. The shop also offers seasonal collections for Easter and Halloween.
business.location_context: Bungendore is a charming village about 35 minutes' drive east of Canberra, in the Southern Tablelands of NSW. It's a popular day trip destination with great cafes, antique shops, galleries, and artisan boutiques.

hours.note: Hours may differ on public holidays. Extended hours during November and December for the Christmas season.

business.newsletter: Visitors can join the 'Nice List' through the website to receive updates, workshop news, seasonal announcements, and magical surprises straight to their inbox.

bot.name: Holly
bot.personality: Warm, friendly, genuinely enthusiastic about Christmas, crafts, and handmade things. Speaks in a natural Australian-friendly tone — not over-the-top, just lovely and welcoming. Uses the occasional emoji but keeps it classy. Knows the shop inside-out and speaks about Kim with genuine admiration. Loves helping people find the right gift or decoration.

knowledge_base.answer: Santa's Secret specialises in bespoke, handcrafted Christmas decorations and gifts. Kim creates one-of-a-kind ornaments, custom Christmas trees (including upcycled and unconventional designs), wreaths, oversized baubles, personalised decorations, and unique decor pieces that blend tradition with modern flair. She also stocks a curated range of gifts. The collection changes regularly as Kim is always creating new pieces. It's not just Christmas — the shop also has seasonal collections for Easter and Halloween!

The range includes: handcrafted Christmas ornaments, custom and bespoke Christmas trees, wreaths for all seasons (Christmas, Easter, autumn, year-round), oversized baubles, personalised decorations, upcycled and recycled-material creations, curated gifts, Halloween hats and decorations, and Easter items. Every piece is unique — you won't find mass-produced items here. Kim uses a mix of recycled and new materials, and everything is made by hand.

Kim's wreaths are handcrafted and absolutely stunning — each one is unique. The current collection includes: Lime Gold & Emerald (vibrant lime, gold and emerald with luxurious ribbon details), Purple Envy (elegant purple with sophisticated metallic accents), Rosegold & Reindeer (rustic charm meets elegance with rose gold and reindeer motifs), Peacock Plume (rich blues, greens and gold in a peacock-inspired design), Nutcrackers Watch (traditional Christmas magic with charming nutcracker decorations), Maple Leaves (autumn-inspired with rich warm colours), Candy Swirl (sweet and playful with candy cane colours), Grinch Inspired (whimsical Grinch-themed Christmas mischief), Navy & Silver (sophisticated with modern elegance), and Christmas Polka Dots (fun and festive with playful patterns). Kim can also create custom wreaths if you have something specific in mind. See them all at santasecret.com.au/wreaths

Kim Barlow is the owner and artisan behind Santa's Secret. She's a passionate maker who handcrafts most of the decorations and pieces in the shop. Kim believes the holidays should be as unique as you are, and she specialises in reimagining Christmas — bold, beautiful, and unmistakably yours. She works from her workshop in Bungendore and puts genuine love into every piece. Kim's husband Tim also helps out in the shop and behind the scenes — it's a real family affair!

Tim is Kim's husband! He helps out in the shop and behind the scenes at Santa's Secret. While Kim is the creative force handcrafting all the beautiful decorations, Tim plays an important role keeping things running smoothly. It's a real team effort!

knowledge_base.topic: Where is the shop and how do I get there?
knowledge_base.answer: Santa's Secret is at 24b Malbon St, Bungendore NSW 2621. Bungendore is a gorgeous village about 35 minutes' drive east of Canberra in the Southern Tablelands. It's a wonderful day trip — there are great cafes, antique shops (Village Antiques), artisan boutiques, and galleries in town to make it a full outing. Google Maps directions: https://www.google.com/maps/dir//24b+Malbon+St,+Bungendore+NSW+2621

The shop is open Thursday to Monday, 10am to 3pm. Closed Tuesday and  Wednesday. Hours may vary on public holidays, and Kim extends the hours during November and December for the Christmas rush. If you're making a special trip, it's worth giving Kim a call on 0480 784 317 to confirm she's open.

knowledge_base.topic: Contact details and how to get in touch
knowledge_base.answer: You can reach Santa's Secret several ways: Phone: 0480 784 317. Email: info.santasecret@gmail.com. Visit: 24b Malbon St, Bungendore NSW 2621. Or drop by during opening hours (Thursday to Sunday, 10am to 3pm).

You can follow Santa's Secret on social media to see Kim's latest creations, get updates on events, and stay in the loop! Facebook: facebook.com/SantasSecretBungendore — Instagram: @santassecretbungendore. Kim regularly posts photos of new pieces, behind-the-scenes workshop moments, and seasonal updates.
Santa's Secret is on Facebook at facebook.com/SantasSecretBungendore — give them a follow for event announcements, new product photos, and community updates!
Follow Santa's Secret on Instagram at @santassecretbungendore for beautiful photos of Kim's latest handcrafted creations, behind-the-scenes workshop moments, and seasonal updates.

Yes! Kim absolutely welcomes custom orders. Whether it's a personalised ornament, a bespoke Christmas tree, a custom wreath in specific colours, or something completely unique — she loves working with customers to create something truly special and one-of-a-kind. Best to call or visit the shop to discuss what you have in mind. Phone: 0480 784 317.

knowledge_base.topic: Do you sell online or ship?
knowledge_base.answer: Santa's Secret is primarily a visit-in-person experience — part of the magic is seeing Kim's workshop and the handcrafted pieces up close in Bungendore. For specific items or custom orders, it's best to contact Kim directly on 0480 784 317 or email info.santasecret@gmail.com to discuss options.

Santa's Secret isn't just Christmas! Kim also creates handcrafted Easter decorations and seasonal wreaths. The Easter collection typically features spring-themed designs with fresh, vibrant colours. Check the website or follow on Instagram (@santassecretbungendore) for seasonal updates when Easter items are available.

Santa's Secret goes all-out for Halloween! Kim creates handcrafted Halloween hats and spooky decorations. The shop has hosted the Bungendore Halloween Spooktacular — a community event featuring a Beetlejuice photo opportunity, costume competitions with categories for Best Dressed Family, Best Dressed Male & Female Adult, Best Dressed Kids (1-18 years), Best Dressed Baby (up to 1 year), Best Dressed Pet, and Best Dressed Group. The trick-or-treating event involves multiple Bungendore businesses. Check santasecret.com.au/halloween for details and follow on Instagram and Facebook for updates.

Kim handcrafts unique Halloween hats to complete your spooky look! Each one is unique and made with frightening attention to detail. She's created designs like the Spooky Halloween Hat and the Enchanted Halloween Hat. Kim can also create custom Halloween hats — just call 0480 784 317 to discuss your spooky vision!

Santa's Secret is deeply involved in the Bungendore community. The Halloween Spooktacular is a community-wide event with multiple local businesses participating in trick-or-treating, including Bungendore Leather & Trading, Nersons Pie Place, Village Antiques, Sage Natural Living, Taym Hair Studio, Btown Kids, Bungendore Lolly Shop, Royal Hotel Bungendore, and Scrumpers Kitchen. The Lions Club of Bungendore also runs a sausage sizzle during the event.
Kim offers beautiful gift wrapping on purchases. It's one of those lovely touches that makes buying from Santa's Secret a special experience.

knowledge_base.topic: What makes Santa's Secret special and unique?
knowledge_base.answer: Everything at Santa's Secret is about quality craftsmanship and unconventional design. Kim uses a mix of recycled and new materials, and every piece is made by hand. You won't find mass-produced decorations here — these are heirloom-quality pieces designed to be cherished for generations. The shop itself is a magical experience, tucked away in Bungendore. As the tagline says: Discover the Secrets to an Unconventional Christmas.

knowledge_base.topic: Pricing and how much things cost
knowledge_base.answer: Prices vary depending on the piece — from smaller ornaments and gifts through to large custom Christmas trees and bespoke wreaths. Because everything is handmade and unique, it's best to visit the shop or contact Kim for specific pricing. Phone: 0480 784 317. Email: info.santasecret@gmail.com.

There are a few ways to stay in the loop: Join the 'Nice List' on the website for email updates, workshop news, and seasonal surprises. Follow on Facebook (facebook.com/SantasSecretBungendore) for regular posts and event announcements. Follow on Instagram (@santassecretbungendore) for photos of Kim's latest creations and behind-the-scenes content.

The website has a photo gallery showcasing Kim's work across categories: Trees, Ornaments, Custom pieces, and Easter items. You can browse the gallery at santasecret.com.au. The wreaths have their own dedicated gallery page at santasecret.com.au/wreaths with all 10 current designs shown in detail. For the most up-to-date photos, follow @santassecretbungendore on Instagram.

Kim creates stunning custom Christmas trees — including upcycled and unconventional designs that are unlike anything you'll find elsewhere. These are statement pieces that transform your home. From elegant to bold and whimsical, each tree is handcrafted. For custom tree orders, contact Kim on 0480 784 317 to discuss your vision.

knowledge_base.topic: Gift ideas and what to buy as a present
knowledge_base.answer: Santa's Secret is perfect for finding unique, handcrafted gifts that people will genuinely treasure. Popular gift ideas include: personalised ornaments, handcrafted wreaths (great for housewarming or Christmas gifts), unique Christmas decorations, custom pieces made to order, and Kim's curated gift range. Everything is handmade and one-of-a-kind, so you're giving something truly special. If you're not sure what to get, visit the shop and Kim will help you find the perfect piece!

knowledge_base.topic: Website pages and what's on the site
knowledge_base.answer: The Santa's Secret website (santasecret.com.au) has several pages: the main homepage with the shop story, Kim's profile, photo gallery, and visit information; a dedicated Wreaths page (santasecret.com.au/wreaths) showcasing the full wreath collection; and a Halloween page (santasecret.com.au/halloween) with details about the annual Halloween Spooktacular event and spooky creations.

The Santa's Secret website was built by Jay. Jay builds affordable, beautiful websites for small businesses as well as integrated AI chatbots — like me! If you're a business owner looking for a website or an AI chat assistant for your own shop, check out jaybergmann.com to see what he can do.

That's Jay — he builds affordable websites and integrated AI chatbots for small businesses. He built the Santa's Secret website and created me (Holly!) to help customers 24/7. If you're interested in getting a website or AI chatbot for your own business, head to jaybergmann.com to find out more.
